"[8] ^WIND ADVISORY ISSUED THROUGHOUT THE ANTELOPE VALLEY AREA: SR-14 FROM WARD ROAD TO THE LA/KERN COUNTY LINE - STRONG WINDS - HIGH PROFILE VEHICLES, CAMPERS, TRAILERS USE CAUTION - REF LOG 1121"
